def handle_user_registration(request_data):
    if not request_data.get("email"):
        return {"error": "email required"}, 400
    if not request_data.get("password"):
        return {"error": "password required"}, 400
    if len(request_data["password"]) < 8:
        return {"error": "password too short"}, 400

    password_hash = bcrypt.hashpw(request_data["password"].encode(), bcrypt.gensalt())
    user = {
        "email": request_data["email"],
        "password_hash": password_hash,
        "name": request_data.get("name", ""),
        "created_at": datetime.utcnow().isoformat(),
    }
    db = get_database()
    db.execute("INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, name, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)",
               user["email"], user["password_hash"], user["name"], user["created_at"])
    db.commit()

    welcome_template = "Welcome, {name}! Your account has been created."
    email_body = welcome_template.format(name=user["name"])
    send_email(user["email"], "Welcome!", email_body)

    return {
        "status": "created",
        "user_id": user["email"],
        "message": f"Account created for {user['name']}",
        "timestamp": user["created_at"],
    }, 201
